calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment) Dismissing With Prejudice [C.C.P. ]473]
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK's Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment Dismissing With Prejudice [C.C.P. 473]

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to set aside and vacate default and default judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
